calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2004 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee
Appearances:
Brian L. Larsen, Esq. For Petitioner: Kenneth Gerber, present as guardian ad litem for Emily Gerber, a minor Claimant, also present; were sworn and examined
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Compromise: $85,000.00
Costs: 2,445.93
Attorney's fees: $21,250.00
Balance to minor: $61,304.07

The amount of $61,304.07 will be deposited into a blocked account at: Bank of America, 550 Battery Street, San Francisco until the minor reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in open court.
